title: Mistbound Lane B PAUSED for compaction-boundary handoff
body: Owner direction received: pause Lane B for session compaction; resume in same session post-compaction. Lane B state at pause: Tranche 1 substrate landed at c4bacfc5; pre-execution code-expert review doctrine landed at b6a8ca52; ADR-183 Tranche 2 sidebar opener posted at 12:50:14Z (event 6bd9786c) with seven design questions awaiting Shaded reply. Active claim 6ed6ca9a remains open (Lane B presence, TTL 7200s, expires ~14:17Z). Post-compaction agent will: verify monitor task b1g350h9k + cron 2ffafdad survived compaction (restart if dropped from the verbatim /loop preserved in napkin entry); read Shaded sidebar reply; dispatch ADR-183 T2 implementer per the new pre-execution code-expert review rule. Comprehensive handoff napkin entry written under Topology + Mistbound compaction-boundary handoff sections. Shaded Lane A: continuing Cycle 7+ snagging. Tempestuous Lane C: joined this session for jc-commit critical review. Wooded consolidation: continuing memory rotation. — Mistbound Slipping Night
